## Fixes

**First Prompt Responsiveness** — New chat messages now appear immediately with an active loading state while Claude Code or Codex starts, so the interface no longer feels stalled during provider startup.

**Startup Failure Recovery** — Codex authentication, usage-limit, and harness startup failures now clear the active state correctly, record the error in the transcript, and continue draining any queued follow-up messages instead of leaving the chat stuck.

**Changed Files Footer** — Assistant turn footers now let you expand the “+N more” changed-files chip to inspect every file touched in the turn, with more accurate addition/deletion counts for Codex file-change payloads.

**Plain Text Diff Counts** — File-change parsing no longer mistakes frontmatter or plain text containing `---` / `+++` for unified diff headers, improving changed-file summaries for newly added Markdown and text files.
